positive: Minimalist stylized illustration of a cosmic woodland scene. A glowing, ethereal forest floor features bioluminescent flora and fauna, depicted with clean, thick lines and crisp black silhouettes against a deep indigo and violet gradient sky. The central subject is a stylized deer with glowing antlers, standing among giant, abstract mushrooms. Incorporate celestial elements like swirling nebulae and crescent moons, rendered in cool tones (cyan, lavender, teal). Use a graphic, nature-meets-space aesthetic, emphasizing symmetry and a strong sense of depth suitable for repeat pattern printing, vector illustration style, high contrast, digital art.
